headline: C.H. Robinson Worldwide Touts “Lean AI” at Morgan Stanley Conference, Citing 40% Productivity Gain
summary: C.H. Robinson Worldwide (NASDAQ:CHRW) executives used a Morgan Stanley TMT Conference appearance to outline how the logistics provider is applying what it calls “Lean AI” to drive productivity, improve service levels, and expand its competitive position in a fragmented transportation market.
